emails.reminder_7d_title: Your CastorWorks trial ends in 7 days
emails.reminder_7d_body: Your trial for {{tenantName}} ends in 7 days ({{expiryDate}}). Upgrade now to keep full access to all features.
emails.reminder_3d_title: Your CastorWorks trial ends in 3 days
emails.reminder_3d_body: Your trial for {{tenantName}} ends in 3 days ({{expiryDate}}). Don't miss out — upgrade now to continue using CastorWorks without interruption.
emails.reminder_1d_body: Your trial for {{tenantName}} ends tomorrow ({{expiryDate}}). Upgrade now to keep full access. After expiry, you'll move to a limited sandbox tier.
emails.expiration_body: Your trial for {{tenantName}} has ended. You now have access to a limited sandbox tier. Upgrade at any time to regain full access to all modules.
